name: Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a bowl.
2. Combine the melted margarine with the stuffing mix and half of the cream of mushroom soup, diluted with 1 cup of chicken broth.
3. Place half of this mixture into a 9 x 13 baking dish.
4. Layer the cooked chicken breasts on top.
5. Pour the remaining cream of mushroom soup, diluted with another cup of chicken broth, over the chicken.
6. Top with the rest of the stuffing and soup mixture.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 1 hour.
